recommended_system_type_en: Any system
recommended_system_type_zh: 未特別限制系統類型
application_fields_en: Powder coatings, industrial coatings.
application_fields_zh: 粉體塗料、工業塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.corrosion_resistance: Improves corrosion resistance on bare and treated cold rolled steel (CRS) when formulated with titanium dioxide or other inorganic pigments. 1% typically reduces mm creep by 25%

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.corrosion_resistance: 當與二氧化鈦或其他無機顏料一起配製時，可提高未處理和已處理冷軋鋼 (CRS) 的防腐蝕性能。添加 1% 通常可減少 25% 的毫米級蔓延。

recommended_system_type_en: Any system
recommended_system_type_zh: 未特別限制系統類型
application_fields_en: Powder coatings.
application_fields_zh: 粉體塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 3.0-7.0% (depending on the desired level of texture)

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Imparts a uniform sandpaper-like surface texture when formulated in a matte polyester/acrylic system. In polyester/epoxy and polyester/HAA systems, provides a smoother, scattered granular surface texture

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 在啞光聚酯/丙烯酸體系中配製時，可提供均勻的砂紙狀表面織紋。在聚酯/環氧和聚酯/HAA 體系中，則提供更平滑、分散的顆粒狀表面織紋。

recommended_system_type_en: Any system
recommended_system_type_zh: 未特別限制系統類型
application_fields_en: Powder coatings.
application_fields_zh: 粉體塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: PTFE (PFAS) free. Can provide PTFE-like texturing with low gloss
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: gloss reduction at 4-6% dosage. Best results for single digit gloss achieved at 6%

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 不含 PTFE (PFAS)。可提供類似 PTFE 的低光澤織紋效果。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 在添加量為 4-6% 時可降低光澤。在 6% 時可達到個位數光澤的最佳效果。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and UV
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和 UV 體系
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, vinyl and leather); architectural wall and trim paints; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; soft touch coatings; floor coatings; visual effects.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、乙烯基和皮革）；建築牆面與飾面漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉體塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；觸感塗料；地板塗料；視覺效果。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-10.0% (higher amounts when greater tactile effects are desired)
suggested_use_level_zh: 2.0-10.0%（若需要更強的觸感效果可增加用量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: improving burnish, scratch and mar resistance. Improves burnish and abrasion resistance
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Provide different tactile effects ranging from satiny smooth to rubbery to leathery in properly formulated coatings. Different particle sizes available to create a unique surface "touch"

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 提高拋光抗性、抗刮傷性和抗劃痕性。改善拋光抗性和耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 在正確配製的塗料中提供從絲綢般光滑、橡膠感至皮革感等不同的觸感效果。可提供不同的粒徑以創造獨特的表面「觸感」。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: improving burnish, scratch and mar resistance. Improves burnish and abrasion resistance
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Provide different tactile effects ranging from satiny smooth to rubbery to leathery in properly formulated coatings. Different particle sizes available to create a unique surface "touch"

recommended_system_type_en: Solvent based and UV
recommended_system_type_zh: 溶劑型和 UV 體系
application_fields_en: Wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; powdered metals.
application_fields_zh: 木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉體塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；金屬粉體。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: scratch resistance and release properties
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: High melting point to improve heat and block resistance
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Adds slip, release and lubricity with an excellent surface "feel". Lowers COF

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 抗刮傷性與脫模性能
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 高熔點可提高耐熱性和抗粘連性
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 增加滑爽性、脫模性和潤滑性，並提供極佳的表面「手感」。降低摩擦係數 (COF)

recommended_system_type_en: Water based and solvent based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性及溶劑型塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; coil coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉體塗料；卷材塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-5.0% depending on the level of gloss reduction desired

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Tough, high molecular weight polymer imparts burnish and abrasion resistance
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: efficient matting and gloss control. Provides consistent gloss reduction with no effect on coating viscosity. burnish resistance
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Adds texture in low bake (Low E) powder coatings

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅韌的高分子量聚合物，可賦予良好的抗拋光性和耐磨損性
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 高效的消光和光澤控制。提供穩定的降光效果且不影響塗料黏度。具備抗拋光性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 賦予防滑性能
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 在低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉體塗料中增加織紋

examples: 東周-UV系統網版印刷及木器漆

application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; floor coatings.

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Improves mar, scratch and metal marking resistance. abrasion resistance
performance_descriptions_en.metal_mark_resistance: Improves mar, scratch and metal marking resistance
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Effective gloss control agent with good burnish resistance in low or medium gloss finishes

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 提高抗劃痕、抗刮傷和抗金屬刮痕性能。改善耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.metal_mark_resistance: 提高抗劃痕、抗刮傷和抗金屬刮痕性能
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 有效的油漆消光劑，在中低光澤塗層中具有良好的抗拋光性
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 表面滑爽性

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and UV
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和 UV 體系
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and masonry); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; powdered metals.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（開括塑料、金屬 and 磚石）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉體塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；金屬粉體。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: improved slip, scratch and rub resistance. Imarts a high degree of lubricity and slip with rub and mar resistance
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Imparts a high degree of lubricity and slip with rub and mar resistance. Consider MP-22C & MP-28C (spherical) for improved surface slip

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 改善滑爽性、抗刮傷性和抗耐磨擦性。賦予高水平的潤滑性與滑爽性，並兼具抗擦傷和抗劃痕性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 賦予高水平的潤滑性與滑爽性，並兼具抗擦傷與抗劃痕性。若需更好的表面滑爽性，可考慮選用 MP-22C 和 MP-28C（球形）。

application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; seed coatings.

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Carnauba wax composite reinforced with 300 nm aluminum oxide nanoparticles (Mohs Hardness 9) Provides maximum scratch resistance with surface lubricity. Less abrasive on processing equipment compared to free aluminum oxide
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Does not adversely affect clarity or gloss
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Provides maximum scratch resistance with surface lubricity

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 有效替代 PTFE 添加劑
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 採用 300 奈米氧化鋁奈米顆粒（莫氏硬度 9）增強的巴西棕櫚蠟複合材料，提供最大程度的抗刮傷性與表面潤滑性。與游離氧化鋁相比，對加工設備的磨損更小。

composition_zh: 高密度聚乙烯/亞乙基雙硬脂醯胺/氧化鋁
recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and UV

application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic and metal); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; can, container, and coil coatings; rubber additives.

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: Maximum scratch resistance; equal to PE/PTFE additives
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: maximum scratch, scuff and block resistance. HDPE/EBS composite reinforced with 300 nm aluminum oxide nanoparticles (Mohs Hardness 9). Good abrasion resistance with slip and lubricity
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Amide wax component provides excellent antiblocking and release properties
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Good abrasion resistance with slip and lubricity. Amide wax component provides excellent antiblocking and release properties

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 極佳的抗刮傷性；效能等同於 PE/PTFE 添加劑
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 最大程度的抗刮傷、抗磨損 and 抗粘連性。採用 300 奈米氧化鋁奈米顆粒（莫氏硬度 9）增強的 HDPE/EBS 複合材料。具有良好的耐磨損性、滑爽性和潤滑性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 醯胺蠟成分提供優異的抗粘連和脫模性能
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 良好的耐磨損性，兼具滑爽性與潤滑性。醯胺蠟成分提供優異的抗粘連和脫模性能。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and UV
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和 UV 體系
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic and metal); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; can, container, and coil coatings; rubber additives.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料和金屬）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉體塗料；罐裝、容器和卷材塗料；橡膠添加劑。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: Effective replacement for PTFE additives. Improved Taber abrasion resistance when compared to PE/PTFE additives
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: HDPE composite reinforced with hard, inert ceramic microspheres and nanoceramic platelets. Improved Taber abrasion resistance when compared to PE/PTFE additives

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 有效替代 PTFE 添加劑。與 PE/PTFE 添加劑相比，提高了泰伯 (Taber) 耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 採用堅硬、惰性的陶瓷微球和奈米陶瓷片增強的高密度聚乙烯複合材料。與 PE/PTFE 添加劑相比，提高了泰伯 (Taber) 耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 提供滑爽性與潤滑性

composition_zh: 亞乙基雙硬脂醯胺/陶瓷
recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and UV
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和 UV 體系
application_fields_en: Wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; powdered metals.
application_fields_zh: 木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉體塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；金屬粉體。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: Excellent scratch and abrasion resistance when compared to PTFE based additives
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Amide wax composite reinforced with hard, inert ceramic microspheres. Excellent scratch and abrasion resistance when compared to PTFE based additives
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: High melting point to improve heat and block resistance
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Adds slip, release and lubricity with an excellent surface "feel". Lowers COF

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 與 PTFE 基添加劑相比，具有優異的抗刮傷和耐磨損性
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 採用堅硬、惰性陶瓷微球增強的醯胺蠟複合材料。與 PTFE 基添加劑相比，具有優異的抗刮傷和耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 高熔點可提高耐熱性和抗粘連性
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 增加滑爽性、脫模性和潤滑性，並提供極佳的表面「手感」。降低摩擦係數 (COF)

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and UV
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和 UV 體系
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and masonry); architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; floor coatings; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; coil coatings; rubber additives.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和磚石）；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；地板塗料；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉體塗料；卷材塗料；橡膠添加劑。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: maximizing surface abrasion resistance (Taber) and film toughness. Fortified with two types of hard, inert ceramic particles. Low density polyethylene provides superior surface toughness, durability and mar resistance

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: Polyfluo 900 的無 PTFE 替代品
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 最大程度地提高表面耐磨損性 (Taber) 和漆膜韌性。採用兩種堅硬、惰性的陶瓷顆粒進行強化。低密度聚乙烯可提供卓越的表面韌性、耐用性和抗劃痕性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
